data.title: Head of Project Management
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose** 




 The Head of Projects is responsible for delivering the Bank's key strategic projects, optimising resources, and driving project execution to meet business objectives. This role ensures that all projects are managed efficiently, from conceptualisation through completion, alignin
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose** 




 The Head of Projects is responsible for delivering the Bank's key strategic projects, optimising resources, and driving project execution to meet business objectives. This role ensures that all projects are managed efficiently, from conceptualisation through completion, aligning outcomes with organisational goals, and maintaining rigorous standards of quality, budget, and timeline.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead, manage, and oversee large\-scale capital projects, ensuring successful delivery within scope, budget, and timeline.
* Develop and implement project management frameworks and best practices to streamline processes.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams and external partners, fostering collaboration to achieve project milestones.
* Identify, mitigate, and manage project risks, ensuring compliance with regulatory and quality standards.
* Oversee project budgeting, resource allocation, and cost management.
* Provide strategic direction and guidance to project managers, enabling their growth and effective performance.
* Engage with senior leadership to communicate project statuses, challenges, and recommendations.
* Monitor progress and drive continuous improvement across all project phases.
* Promote a culture of innovation, accountability, and excellence in project execution.



  





**Key Skills, Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, Business Administration, or related field. Postgraduate qualification or PMP certification is highly preferred.
* Minimum 15 years of relevant experience in leading capital projects, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role.
* Proven track record in managing high\-value, complex projects with multidisciplinary teams.
* Deep understanding of project management methodologies, frameworks, and tools.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and negotiation capabilities.
* High proficiency in budgeting, scheduling, and risk management.
* Ability to drive change and foster a high\-performance project culture.

data.title: Director Public Policy & Government Affairs
data.raw_snippet: talabat is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70\+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stoc
data.jd_text:
talabat is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70\+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are hiring a Director of Public Policy \& Government Affairs to lead talabat’s regulatory and government engagement across priority GCC and MENA markets.
   

  

 This is a senior leadership role for a policy professional with a proven track record of influencing regulatory outcomes in complex, highly regulated environments. You will work closely with senior leadership to anticipate policy risk, shape government frameworks, and position talabat as a credible, long\-term partner to regulators and public institutions.
   

  

 The role combines external influence, policy strategy, and internal leadership, with direct exposure to C\-suite decision\-making.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead engagement with government entities, regulators, competition authorities, and public sector stakeholders across the region
* Shape and influence policy and regulatory frameworks impacting:
+ competition and pricing
+ platform regulation
+ labour and workforce models
+ consumer protection
+ digital, data, and sustainability policy

* Develop and execute policy and advocacy strategies aligned with business priorities
* Represent talabat in industry associations, councils, and working groups
* Anticipate regulatory and political risks; advise senior leadership on timing, likelihood, and impact
* Support crisis response and regulatory escalations that affect operations Partner closely with Communications, Legal, Operations, Finance, and Strategy teams
* Act as an internal centre of excellence for government engagement and public policy standards
* Coach and guide market teams on effective and compliant government relations


**Qualifications**
 Preferred candidates will be:
   

  

* 10\+ years’ experience in public policy, government affairs, regulatory strategy, or public sector leadership
* Demonstrated success influencing policy or regulatory outcomes in the GCC and/or wider MENA region
* Hands\-on experience engaging with ministers, regulators, senior civil servants, and competition authorities
* Background in highly regulated sectors (technology platforms, telecoms, mobility, energy, financial services, or similar)
* Strong understanding of how regulation impacts growth, margins, market structure, and investor confidence
* Credible, discreet, and trusted at senior levels, with the judgement to operate in politically sensitive environments
* Executive presence, clear communication style, and the confidence to challenge constructively
* Experience working in or alongside multinational or regional businesses is a strong advantage
* Fluency in verbal and written English and Arabic.

data.title: Senior Manager Program Delivery
data.raw_snippet: Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 d
data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations
   

  

**About The Role**
 Do you enjoy leading complex enterprise programmes and bringing clarity, structure, and momentum to large‑scale change?
   

  

 You’ll manage end‑to‑end delivery of our Enterprise Systems portfolio, spanning ERP, HCM, Finance, Procurement, EPM, Automation, and Corporate Platforms.
   

  

 In this critical role, you’ll also set the benchmark for reliable and secure programme delivery, fully aligned with our Enterprise Systems Operating Model.
   

  

 Your focus will be on enabling stable, scalable, and high‑performing enterprise solutions, while ensuring operational continuity is never compromised.
   

  

 Importantly, you’ll provide end‑to‑end ownership of enterprise initiatives, driving stakeholder alignment, vendor performance, disciplined change and release management, and deployment readiness.
   

  

 This role also champions continuous improvement, risk management, and a strong focus on safety and operational readiness.
   

  

 As a people leader, you will build, coach, and empower high‑performing teams, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous learning.
   

  

 If you’re ready to lead complex enterprise programmes with real impact, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**About You**
 Degree qualified, you will demonstrate a minimum of 10 years' experience in Enterprise Systems delivery, ERP, HRIS, Finance, Procurement, EPM, or Digital Transformation.
   

  

 You are expected to have strong track record in vendor management, stakeholder engagement, and aligning IT with business goals.
   

  

 Your expertise includes programme planning, financial oversight, and risk management within regulated settings.
   

  

 We’d love to hear from you even more if you have proven leadership experience managing programme teams, stakeholders, and delivery partners across enterprise initiatives.
   

  

 This is your opportunity to shape the future of air travel. Bring your best and show us why you can own this position within Riyadh Air.
   

  

 Please submit your application by clicking on the Apply button. Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications shortly.

data.title: Head of Operations - ESM
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking a strategic and experienced
 **Head of Operations** 
 to oversee the operational delivery of all departments within ESM. This leadership role is crucial to ensuring that all programmes and services run smoothly, efficiently, and to the highest standards. The successful candidate will
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a strategic and experienced
 **Head of Operations** 
 to oversee the operational delivery of all departments within ESM. This leadership role is crucial to ensuring that all programmes and services run smoothly, efficiently, and to the highest standards. The successful candidate will drive operational excellence, foster internal and external relationships, and implement scalable systems to support our growing organisation.
   

  

 You'll play a key role in aligning departmental execution with business goals, ensuring compliance with safety and safeguarding standards, and supporting the continued success of our venues and partnerships.
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 Lead and manage the operations of ESM departments, providing efficient plans for the smooth running of all programmes and services offered by all departments.
   

  

**Key Objectives**
* Build and maintain excellent relationships with all key internal and external stakeholders to ensure smooth running of operations and providing valued services by all users.
* Oversee and manage the plans of activities and programmes in all venues by guiding and holding relevant team members accountable for revenue generation and gross profit of their respective venues.
* Oversee the plan of staff requirements for all programmes and venues, including leave schedules and effective coordination and planning with department leaders and relevant stakeholders for required operations of secured new contracts.
* Ensure all activities and programmes adhere to the local laws, rules, and regulations of governing bodies and health \& safety and child safeguarding standards.
* Oversee the implementation of health \& safety rules and aspects and ensure proper procedures are in place for staff and providers' compliance.
* Liaise with all ESM departments to ensure all operational elements are regularly updated and checked on the relevant systems.
* The role forms part of the Senior Leadership Team within the organisation, with monthly reporting responsibilities and required participation in leadership meetings.


**Set Of Required Skills, Knowledge And Behaviours**
**Desired Qualifications:**
* Degree in sports, business, or a similar qualification related to the field


**Desired Experience:**
* Sufficient experience in schools, sports and enrichment fields
* Sports Industry experience is highly desired
* In\-depth knowledge of industry trends
* Local knowledge of UAE and regional sports businesses
* Proven operational strategic management experience


**Job\-Specific Knowledge \& Skills:**
* High\-level IT skills including database management
* High\-level communication skills; verbal and written
* Advanced presentation and design skills
* Strong leadership qualities and people management skills
* Customer service and relationship management skills
* Time management
* Maintaining confidentiality
* Confidence and ability to make decisions
* Problem solving \& conflict resolution
* Financial intelligence


**What We Offer**
* Competitive Salary
* Annual flight allowance
* Private medical insurance
* CPD (Continuing Professional Development) package
* End of service benefit
* Access to lifestyle discounts


**Please note:** 
 Only candidates who meet the specified qualifications and requirements will be contacted.

data.title: Director of Operations
data.raw_snippet:
The
 **Director of Operations** 
 will work directly with the management of the firm to ensure smooth execution of strategic priorities, operational efficiency, and drive business growth. The ideal candidate will
 **have in\-depth familiarity with both systematic and discretionary trading** 
 , as w
data.jd_text:
The
 **Director of Operations** 
 will work directly with the management of the firm to ensure smooth execution of strategic priorities, operational efficiency, and drive business growth. The ideal candidate will
 **have in\-depth familiarity with both systematic and discretionary trading** 
 , as well as some managerial experience – in the best case gathered by spending time in both a startup as well as a larger corporate environment.
 



  





**The main constituents of the book of work are as follows:** 



* Partner with management to run the business day\-to\-day and drive long\-term strategy
* Pivot seamlessly between tactical execution and strategic planning
* Coordinate and drive execution of cross\-departmental projects, identify dependencies and manage timelines to keep initiatives on track
* Provide clear and concise updates to the management on progress across multiple projects or workstreams
* Support business development and decision\-making with data analysis, research, and well\-structured recommendations



  





**Required qualifications** 
 :
 


* Bachelor’s degree in finance, economics, engineering, or a related field; advanced degree preferred
* 7\+ years of professional experience in trading, financial services, management consulting, or similarly demanding environment
* Exceptional analytical, problem\-solving, and interpersonal skills
* Excellent written and verbal communication abilities
* Ability to think strategically while executing tactically, often under tight deadlines
* Highly organized, detail\-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced environment



**Nice to have** 
 :
 ***Experience in physical commodities is a plus***

data.title: Senior Consultant | Project Manager | Contractor | Technology & Transformation | Jordan
data.raw_snippet:
**Technology \& Transformation \| Cyber \| Project Manager – Senior Consultant**
 When you work for us, you commit to a career at one of the largest and most prestigious professional services firms in the world. We have received numerous awards over the last few years, including Best Employer in the
data.jd_text:
**Technology \& Transformation \| Cyber \| Project Manager – Senior Consultant**
 When you work for us, you commit to a career at one of the largest and most prestigious professional services firms in the world. We have received numerous awards over the last few years, including Best Employer in the Middle East, and Best Consulting Firm, and the Middle East Training \& Development Excellence Award.
   

  

 Deloitte Consulting in the Middle East (“DME\-C”) is on an existing transformation and growth journey, as part of this, it plans to further strengthen its internal functions which provide foundations for scaling safely. The journey will pivot us to large and complex deals in transformation; technology implement and operate. Accordingly, DME\-C is seeking to recruit a dynamic and experienced
 **Project Manager**
**Our Purpose**
 Deloitte makes an impact that matters. Every day we challenge ourselves to do what matters most—for clients, for our people, and for society. We serve clients distinctively, bringing innovative insights, solving complex challenges and unlocking sustainable growth. We inspire our talented professionals to deliver outstanding value to clients, providing an exceptional career experience and an inclusive and collaborative culture. We contribute to society, building confidence and trust in the markets, upholding the integrity of organizations and supporting our communities.
   

  

 Our shared values guide the way we behave to make a positive, enduring impact:
   

  

* Integrity
* Outstanding value to markets and clients
* Commitment to each other
* Strength from cultural diversity


**Roles And Responsibilities**
 Develop detailed project plans, including scope, schedule, resources, and budget.
   

  

 Coordinate internal resources and third parties/vendors for the flawless execution of projects.
   

  

 Ensure resource availability and allocation.
   

  

 Manage changes to the project scope, project schedule, and project costs using appropriate verification techniques.
   

  

 Measure project performance using appropriate tools and techniques to monitor progress and identify areas for improvement.
   

  

 Report and escalate to management as needed.
   

  

 Successfully manage the relationship with the client and all stakeholders.
   

  

**Skills**
 Proven working experience in project management.
   

  

 Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
   

  

 Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multitasking abilities.
   

  

 Strong leadership qualities and ability to manage teams.
   

  

 Proficiency with project management software tools (e.g., MS Project, JIRA, Asana).
   

  

 Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Management, or related field; Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is a plus.
